---
title: "Session 3 Demos: Tools and Workflow"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
---

This demo set supports the Session 3 lecture and hands-on workflow examples. Each notebook can be run live or assigned for at-home replication when time is limited.

## Notebook Sequence

1. [VS Code GUI Agent Quickstart](4-vscode-gui-agent/vscode-gui-agent-quickstart.html)
2. [Git Push/Pull Bridge for PHI-Constrained Work](5-git-push-pull/git-push-pull-bridge.html)
3. [tmux Session/Window/Pane Workflow](6-tmux-workflow/tmux-launchers-and-aliases.html)
4. [Two-Machine PHI Workflow (Synthetic/Simulated Development)](7-phi-two-machine/phi-two-machine-synthetic-simulated.html)

## Context A/B Exercise (Palmer Penguins)

Run an agent in each directory with the same prompt. Compare whether the agent follows the styling rules when an `AGENTS.md` is present.

- [With context file (`AGENTS.md`)](8-context-comparison/with-context/visualization-task.html)
- [Without context file](8-context-comparison/without-context/visualization-task.html)

## Suggested Use

- In class: run 2-3 notebooks end-to-end
- At home: complete the remaining notebooks and keep verification notes
